titleStmt.title: SII 9.383: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 383. (A.R. No. 242 of 1918.) ON A PILLAR OF THE MALLIKARJUNASVAMI TEMPLE AT KUNCHURU, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 15th year of the reign of the Yādava king Vīra-Rāmachandrarāya, cyclic year Sarvajit, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 15, Sōmavāra. In Sarvajit = 1287 the tithi cited fell on Saturday, not Monday as stated. But in the previous year it fell on Monday = A.D. 1286 August 5, which was probably the intended date. The inscription records that under the orders of Liṅgadēva-Rāṇeya, son of Maṇḍalika Jājjigidēva, Sarvādhikāri Jakkarasa made over the sotra (land) of the god Mallikārjunadēva of the village Mattavūra to the chief priest Kalleyajīya-Haripajīya, in the presence of Jagadāḷa Nācharasa, Mallaṇṇa, the eight Hiṭṭus and other people.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīyādavanārāyaṇa bhujabaḷaprauḍhapratāpacakravarti śrīvīrarāmacaṁdrarāyavijayarājyōdayada ha 15 neya sarbba
jitusaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa su 15 sōmavāradali bhārasaṁkaleya maṁḍaḷika jājjigidēvanakumāra liṁgadēvarāṇe
yanu mattavūra mallikārjunadēvara śotravanu Aṁgabhōga Aṁritavaḍige liṁgadēvarāṇeyana nirūpadiṁ
śrīmatu sarvvādhikāri jakkarasaru śrīmaṁmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ maṁneyagoḍati jagadāḷanācarsaru vūraḍe
ya malla(ṁ)ṇnamukhyavāda samastapraje Eṇṭuhiṭṭu sthānamā(ṁ)nyada muṁde Ā jakkarasanu mallikārjunadēvara Ācā
ryya kalleyajīya haripajīyaṁge dhārāpūrbbaka
vāgi koṭṭaru Iṁtī dhar(ṁ)mmake Āvanānuṁ Obbanu A
ḷiva taṁdaḍe śrīvāraṇāsigaṁgeya taḍiyallu brāhma
ṇana kapileya ta(ṁ)nna svahastadiṁ koṁda brahmātidōsava
kku śrīmallikārjjunadēva śaraṇu .
Digital edition of SII 9.383 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
